description_long: This object is a cartoonish sausage with a smooth, pinkish exterior and a slightly rounded top and bottom. The front features two large, round, protruding eyes and a black, downturned mouth, giving it a surprised or sad expression. The body is cylindrical and tapers gently at both ends, with no visible seams or casing details. The surface appears uniform in color and texture, with a matte finish and no visible grill marks, toppings, or packaging. The back and sides are featureless, maintaining the same color and smoothness throughout. The sausage is standing upright, as if placed directly on a flat surface.
description: A smooth, pink cartoon sausage with large eyes and a sad mouth, featuring a matte, uniform surface and no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sausage's expressive face with large eyes and a downturned mouth.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cylindrical shape and the protrusion of the eyes, with no other features visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a featureless, smooth, pink surface with no facial features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cylindrical form and slight eye protrusion.
